creator: Jos.Backus@nl.origin-it.com
text:
/etc/rc starts with a single quote (') character, probably a result of
	a typing glitch (I know, I have a keyboard that makes me do that
	occasionally).

Fix: 

s%'#!/bin/sh%#!/bin/sh%
How-To-Repeat: 
	cp -p /usr/src/etc /etc/rc
	reboot
	# watch the screen!
